OF ATTACKS: 1 DAMAGE/ATTACK: 1d6 or by weapon SPECIAL ATTACKS: Magic missile SPECIAL DEFENSES: Blink MAGIC RESISTANCE: As for skeleton type SIZE: M (5'-6" tall) MORALE: Steady (11-12) XP VALUE: 975 Baneguards are skeletons, usually but not always human, which are animated by clerical spells to serve as guardian creatures. The create baneguard spell was originally researched by priests of Bane (of the FORGOTTEN REALMS setting), but in the years since
